attacks.name: Sparkle Mine
attacks.effect: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Celebi

description: Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It's kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.

abilities.name: Nervous Seed
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Basic Pokémon's attacks cost Colorless more.

name: Trevenant

description: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.

attacks.name: Let's Eat Together
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from both Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Pikachu

description: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it's filled with a mysterious power.

attacks.name: Mach Claw
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

name: Umbreon

attacks.name: Rock Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Rock Drill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Aerodactyl-EX.
